overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic Western-themed video game. The player character walks along a rainy night-time harbor dock, passing crates and brick warehouses, before entering a railway yard where a steam train passes by. The atmosphere is moody with gas lamp lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock walkway between warehouse and harbor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock beside the brick warehouse, passing stacked cargo crates and barrels

entered.detail: tall brick warehouse wall with weathered texture running along the right side of the dock
wet wooden planks forming the dock walkway, reflecting the gas lamp light
stacked wooden shipping crates and cargo boxes along the dock edge
metal barrels and cylindrical containers stacked near the warehouse wall
tall wooden post with glowing gas lamp illuminating the rainy dock area
dark water of the harbor visible beyond the dock edge with distant boat masts

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden dock at night during a heavy rainstorm. A tall brick warehouse wall runs along the right side while the harbor water is visible to the left. Gas lamps provide warm illumination against the cool blue night, reflecting off the wet wooden planks. Stacked crates and barrels line the walkway.

events.description: character stops at the dock edge and turns left to face the harbor water and boats
character turns back toward the dock walkway and resumes walking forward

agents.ego_description: pausing at the dock edge to look out at the boats moored in the harbor, then turning back to continue along the dock

entered.detail: wooden posts and pilings extending from the dock edge into the water
silhouettes of boats and ship masts visible in the dark harbor water

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the dock section and turns to face the open harbor, observing the boats and water in the rain. The camera pans to show the expanse of the water before the character turns back toward the dock walkway. The gas lamp is now closer and more prominent in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: warehouse dock area with storage crates and railway entrance

events.description: approaching the transition from wooden dock to railway yard area with red shed visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past stacked cargo crates and barrels toward the railway yard entrance, passing a red wooden shed

entered.detail: small red wooden shed or building with glowing light inside, located near the railway entrance
white painted metal gate and fencing marking the entrance to the railway yard

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the dock, now with the brick warehouse wall on the left side. The path leads toward a red wooden shed and a white gate marking the entrance to the railway yard. Stacked crates and barrels line the right side of the walkway as the environment transitions from pure dock to industrial railway area.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway yard with multiple tracks and approaching train

events.description: steam train approaches on the tracks with bright headlight cutting through the rain and fog
train passes by the character on the adjacent tracks, emitting steam and smoke

agents.ego_description: walking along the railway tracks as a steam train approaches and passes by, illuminated by its bright headlight

notable_agents.action: steam locomotive approaching on the tracks with headlight blazing, then passing by emitting smoke and steam

entered.detail: metal railway tracks with wooden ties and gravel ballast, wet from the rain
gravel and dirt ground surface between and alongside the railway tracks
metal chain-link fencing and white painted railings along the right side of the tracks
railway signal lights and poles visible in the distance along the tracks
large black steam locomotive with bright headlight and smokestack emitting steam

segments.scene_description: The character enters the railway yard, leaving the wooden dock behind for gravel ground and metal tracks. The space opens up with full sky visibility. A steam train approaches with its headlight cutting through the rainy darkness, then passes by the character with smoke and steam billowing. Metal fencing lines the right side while the warehouse recedes into the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway corridor between freight cars and brick wall

events.description: character continues walking alongside the moving freight train cars

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the moving freight train cars on the gravel tracks, continuing down the railway corridor

notable_agents.action: freight train cars moving slowly alongside the character on the parallel tracks

entered.detail: boxy freight train cars with graffiti and weathered metal siding moving along the tracks
tall brick wall running parallel to the tracks on the right side, creating a corridor effect
wooden railway buildings and structures visible in the distance along the tracks

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the moving freight train cars, which now occupy the left side of the frame. The environment becomes a narrow corridor between the train on the left and a tall brick wall on the right. The ground remains gravel with railway tracks underfoot, and distant wooden buildings are visible ahead along the tracks. The rain continues to fall as the character proceeds down the railway line.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, rain-slicked harbor dock into an expansive industrial railway yard. It begins with the character walking along wooden planks between a tall brick warehouse and the harbor water, where warm gas lamps reflect off the wet surfaces and stacked crates. As the character reaches the end of the dock and pauses to observe the open water, the camera pans across the rainy harbor before turning back to follow the path toward a red wooden shed and a white gate. The scene then shifts from the wooden walkway to gravel ground and metal tracks as the character enters the railway yard, where a steam train cuts through the darkness with its headlight and billowing smoke. Finally, the environment narrows into a corridor between the moving freight cars on the left and a brick wall on the right, proceeding down the railway line toward distant wooden buildings under the persistent rain.
